title: verilator@4.034：make test the test case fails to be built in.
body:
Hello,I meet a problem about make test the test case fails to be built in verilator@4.034
```console
[root@centos8 test_regress]# make test
……
-Skip: vltmt/t_xml_tag: scenario 'vltmt' not enabled for test
vltmt/t_xml_tag: %Skip: Skip: scenario 'vltmt' not enabled for test
==SUMMARY: Passed 1972  Failed 31  Skipped 145  Unsup 29  Time 142:50
==SUMMARY: Passed 1972  Failed 31  Skipped 145  Unsup 29  Time 142:50

======================================================================

                make && test_regress/t/t_a4_examples.pl  --dist
        #vlt/t_flag_wpedantic_bad: %Error: Line 1 mismatches; obj_vlt/t_flag_wpedantic_bad/vlt_compile.log != t/t_flag_wpedantic_bad.out
                make && test_regress/t/t_flag_wpedantic_bad.pl  --vlt

                make && test_regress/t/t_iff.pl  --vlt
```

I know they are coredump problems. What are the solutions for this version?
